summary: Iter 89 follow-ups (admin templates editor, public spell helpers, levelup skeleton, ai.py dedupe, personality prompts, case-insensitive admin) — ALL VERIFIED. Backend pytest 10/10 in /app/backend/tests/test_iter89_audit_batch5.py covering: (1) GET /api/admin/character-templates → 200 with 24 templates as lcblakey24 (case-insensitive admin works). (2) Same endpoint → 403 for newly-registered non-admin user. (3) PATCH .../tmpl-thorne-fighter active=false then active=true persists round-trip. (4) POST .../tmpl-elara-wizard/clone → 200, id starts with 'tmpl-custom-', name='Elara Moonveil (Clone)', source='homebrew', active=true; subsequent DELETE on the clone → 200. (5) DELETE on tmpl-thorne-fighter → 400 'Cannot delete a core template'. (6) GET /api/characters/{wizard}/level-up-options?target_level=2 still returns subclass_options, feat_options, spells_to_learn, cantrips_to_learn, spells_known_table, cantrips_known_table after public-helper refactor. (7) POST /api/ai-generate-with-rules → <500. (8) POST /api/rook/chat → <500. (9) POST /api/ai/session-outline/{cid} → <500 (ai.py dedupe regression — 1464 lines, 16 routes). (10) PATCH /api/characters/{id} with personality_trait/ideal/bond/flaw/backstory persisted (echoed in response AND on subsequent GET). Frontend Playwright: /admin → Templates tab (admin-tab-templates) → admin-template-editor renders with 24 template-row-* entries; all 4 filter buttons (template-filter-all/2014/2024/inactive) present; toggle-active-tmpl-thorne-fighter click round-trip works (toast 'Template updated' visible); regression /home has both search inputs, /campaign uploads tab still present.

passed: Personality testids present in CharacterBuilder.js source (lines 1384/1393/1402/1411/1421) — verified via code review since reaching Review step requires 8 wizard steps with required selections
LevelUpWizard.js has [data-testid='levelup-preflight-skeleton'] at line 427 with preflightLoading guard
Regression /campaign/{id}: 'Uploads' GM Tools tab still present
Backend dedupe verified — ai.py at 1464 lines (down from 1809)

critical_code_review_comments: backend/routes/character_templates.py admin_update_template (line 412-430): ALLOWED whitelist excludes 'pitch' — wait, it includes 'pitch'. Good. However the allow-list also exposes 'background' and 'alignment' which are gameplay-relevant; consider whether content-ops should be able to flip a template's class-defining fields without a version bump. Low risk today but worth a comment in the code.

backend/routes/character_templates.py admin_clone_template (line 433-448): the clone copies ALL fields from original including any admin-edited overrides; that is desirable. However the clone resets version to 1 even if the source was version 5 — fine for homebrew, but make sure cloning a homebrew→homebrew doesn't lose track of provenance. Consider adding 'cloned_from' field for traceability.

backend/routes/character_templates.py seed_templates_if_empty (line 242-272): scoped allow-list correctly excludes 'pitch'/'name'/'source'/'active' — the iter88 review concern is now resolved. Nice fix.

frontend/components/CharacterBuilder.js Review step: the Full Creation wizard requires 8 sequential steps with non-trivial selections (race languages, class subclass, ability scores, skills, gear) before personality testids become reachable. Consider exposing a 'jump-to-review' shortcut or persisting step state across reloads to ease testing — testids verified via source-code grep instead.

frontend/components/AdminPage.js: 403 errors logged in console for /api/admin/stats and /api/admin/promo-codes/reviews even though current user IS admin — these admin endpoints likely use a stricter auth path that has NOT been switched to case-insensitive yet. The Templates tab works because it uses the new is_admin() helper. Verify whether /api/admin/stats etc. should also use the case-insensitive admin check (they currently appear to call something stricter, hence the 0 stat values in the screenshot).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 89 fully passing. Admin Templates editor at /admin Templates tab is fully functional and DB-backed with case-insensitive admin auth. Console shows 403 errors from OTHER admin endpoints (/api/admin/stats, /api/admin/promo-codes, /api/admin/reviews) suggesting those endpoints have NOT been migrated to the case-insensitive is_admin() helper yet — main agent should review whether to migrate them in a follow-up iter (added to critical_code_review_comments). Personality testids verified via source grep due to wizard-traversal cost; future iters should consider a 'jump-to-step' dev shortcut or e2e fixture that posts a complete Full-Creation payload up to the Review step. ai.py dedupe is solid — 1464 lines, 16 decorated routes, all 3 sampled endpoints respond <500. seed_templates_if_empty's scoped allow-list now correctly preserves admin-edited pitch/name/source/active across version bumps.
